Why Totalis About Us Locate Us

WHY 
TOTALIS 

Partnering with Totalis means more than products

Why Partner with Totalis as a Fabricator?

At Totalis, we believe in empowering our fabricator partners with everything they need to succeed. When you choose to work with us, you don't just get access to premium aluminium systems, you gain a partnership built on trust, technology, and flexibility.

Contact Us

What You Get with Totalis

Complete System from One Source

No need to juggle multiple suppliers. With Totalis, you get aluminium systems, hardware, and accessories from a single, reliable source.

Technical Manuals & Brochures

Comprehensive documentation and product literature make it easy to understand, market, and sell our solutions.

Starter Training & Onboarding

We equip you with the right knowledge from day one, from fabrication techniques to installation know-how.

Business Flexibility

Your business, your way. Totalis offers you the freedom to operate independently while enjoying the backing of a trusted brand.

Estimation & Engineering Software Access

Simplify your workflow with our dedicated software tools that help in accurate estimation, precision engineering, and faster project turnaround.

Better Cash Flow Support

With optimized supply cycles, no stocking up inventory and flexible order sizes, Totalis helps you keep working capital free and your projects moving without unnecessary financial strain.

Reliable Stock Availability

No delays, no downtime. Our streamlined supply chain ensures that you always get the material you need, when you need it.

Grow with Totalis

Join the Totalis fabricator network and take your business to the next level with engineered aluminium windows that are tested and trusted.

Send Inquiry

Our Product Range

Every detail engineered for performance, durability, and design.

TOT SD NEXGEN

Central locking. Weather-resistant. Sturdy performance.

TOT SD LITE

Lightweight design. Cost-efficient. Smooth operation.

TOT SD PLUS

Customizable tracks. Enhanced security. Energy-efficient options.

TOT CS

Hassle-free installation. Multiple color options. Better ventilation.

TOT RL 80

High strength tested. Continuous design. Multiple handrail options.

TOT RL 125

Impact engineered. Greater height capacity. Wide glass customizations.

Features That Set Totalis Apart

Every detail engineered for performance, durability, and design.

High-Quality Aluminium

Long lasting durability from Hindalco

Rollers & Locks

Superior quality rollers and hassle-free operations.

Leak-Proof Sealing

Keeps interiors dry even in heavy monsoons.

Laminated and DGU Glass

Helps maintain room temperature efficiently.

Acoustic Control

Blocks outdoor noise for peaceful indoors.

Custom Finishes

Choose from a range of premium colours.

Superior Quality Locks

Enhanced safety with secure locking system

Sustainable materials

100% recyclable, made with green metal.

Shaping Skylines with excellence

15000 Sqft.

Contact Us

TOTALIS

Totalis by Hindalco Industries Limited supplies tested and certified aluminium extrusions and hardware components. Fabrication, assembling, installation, servicing, and warranty of the finished window system are the sole responsibility of the fabricator. Users acknowledge that their contractual relationship is with the fabricator. Please contact your fabricator for details on warranties and after-sales service
